reasoning: This video is educational/promotional content showing live surgical procedures (laparoscopic cystostomy and cholecystectomy on live pig models) with on-screen text overlays and branding. It is NOT an FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) MISTELS task video. The content depicts actual surgical procedures on live animal tissue, not the standardized FLS trainer box tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture).

reason_no_score: This video does not depict any of the five FLS MISTELS tasks. It is educational/promotional content showing live laparoscopic surgical procedures on animal models. FLS scoring requires completion of one of five standardized trainer box tasks: Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture. This video contains none of these.
